name: Broken Glass Dessert
recipeIngredient: 8 oz carton frozen whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar and butter; press onto the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch greased pan. Chill.
2. Combine lime gelatin and 1 1/2 cups boiling water; stir until gelatin is dissolved. Pour into an oiled 8x4x2-inch loaf pan; chill until very firm.
3. Repeat for strawberry and orange gelatins.
4. Soften the unflavored gelatin in cold water.
5. Boil pineapple juice; stir into unflavored gelatin. Set aside until slightly thickened.
6. Place whipped topping in a large bowl; gently fold in pineapple juice mixture.
7. When flavored gelatins are firm, cut into 1-inch cubes; gently fold into whipped topping mixture.
8. Spoon over crust. Chill for at least 2 hours.
